'''Sistra''' was one of the many [[Color/Legends|purple]] [[Granite/Legends|granite]] mountains on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]] and was home to a [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Melodie]]s. This mountain was dominated by pools, caves and caverns. These bodies of water were home to the adult Melodies known as [[Elder (Melodie)|Elders]], while the young of Melodie society—who had not yet [[Changing Ceremony|changed]]—resided around these pools in the caves and caverns of the mountain.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' {{1st}}
